# Incipit

> Here begins the new career. A Go CLI tool that converts structured resume data (JSON/Markdown) into polished PDFs, HTML, LaTeX, DOCX, and Markdown. Features AI-powered resume review, optimization, and creation via multiple LLM providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Ollama), a modular template system, and JSON Schema generation.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/README.md): Installation, CLI usage, templates, and prerequisites
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Architecture, data flow, AI provider system, and development guide
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Setup, testing, adding templates

## API / Key Files

- [cmd/incipit/main.go](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/cmd/incipit/main.go): Binary entry point
- [internal/cli/](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/internal/cli/): Cobra CLI commands (run, generate, ai, templates)
- [ai/](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/ai/): AI agent logic (provider resolution, review, optimize, create)
- [generators/](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/generators/): Core generation logic, formatters, HTML/LaTeX/Markdown/DOCX generators
- [resume/](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/resume/): Resume data model, validation, JSON/Markdown parsing
- [compilers/](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/compilers/): PDF compilation (LaTeX engines, Rod/Chromium)
- [templates/](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/templates/): Built-in templates
- [Skill](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/skills/resume/SKILL.md): Agent skill for resume workflows
